abi: event ContractAddressesUpdated(address TigerStaking, address rwaRevenue, address treasury)
event DividendClaimRecorded(address indexed tokenAddress, address indexed holder, uint256 amount)
event DividendDistributedToStaker(address indexed tokenAddress, address indexed holder, uint256 amount)
event PropertyDividendReceived(uint256 indexed assetId, address indexed tokenAddress, uint256 amount)
event RoleAdminChanged(bytes32 indexed role, bytes32 indexed previousAdminRole, bytes32 indexed newAdminRole)
event RoleGranted(bytes32 indexed role, address indexed account, address indexed sender)
event RoleRevoked(bytes32 indexed role, address indexed account, address indexed sender)
function distributeDividendToStaker(address tokenAddress, address holder, uint256 amount)
function getClaimableDividends(address tokenAddress, address holder) view returns (uint256)

function getRewardPoolStats() view returns (uint256 _totalRewardPool, uint256 _distributedRewards, uint256 _pendingRewards, uint256 _totalRevenueCollected, uint256 _marketplaceFeesCollected, uint256 _propertyDividendsCollected)
function getTokenDividendStats(address tokenAddress) view returns (uint256 totalAllocated, uint256 totalDistributed, uint256 available)
function hasRole(bytes32 role, address account) view returns (bool)
function hasSufficientDividends(address tokenAddress, uint256 amount) view returns (bool)
function receivePropertyDividends(uint256 assetId, address tokenAddress, uint256 amount)
function recordDividendClaim(address tokenAddress, address holder, uint256 amount)
